why_winner: B's hook is genuinely arguable (people believe prompting tricks matter) which passes the tracker's bold-claim filter, and it reframes the listicle as an insight rather than a link dump. C is the most save-worthy but its numbered-list hook is generic; A's personal traceback is strong but slower.

runner_up_notes.A: The 'I traced every bad AI day back to myself' beat is the most authentic moment across all three; worth reusing on the blog version.
runner_up_notes.C: The numbered 8-item format is the most screenshot-able; the image should carry the checklist instead.
